label: Smartest Pak
blurb: Deep FinOps, Data Engineering & Cyber. Extreme cloud cost reduction and proactive threat hunting.

skills.label: Active Directory Ghost Hunter
skills.method: Cross-references Active Directory accounts against HR termination lists, disabling rogue administrator accounts left behind by IT.

skills.label: Third Party Api Circuit Breaker
skills.method: Monitors external APIs (e.g., Twilio, Stripe). If latency spikes or 500 errors occur, it halts requests and fails over to a backup provider to prevent cascading system failure.
trigger_examples: keeps apps online when dependencies die

skills.label: S3 Lifecycle Policy Generator
skills.method: Scans AWS S3 buckets for files un-accessed in 90 days, generating the Terraform code to move them to Glacier Deep Archive.

skills.label: Cdn Cache Hit Optimizer
skills.method: Analyzes Cloudflare/Fastly logs to find dynamically generated pages that could actually be statically cached, rewriting the caching headers.
trigger_examples: drops server load and speeds up global load times

skills.label: K8s Rightsizing Advisor
skills.method: Analyzes historical CPU/Memory usage of Kubernetes pods, rewriting the YAML resource limits to stop developers from over-provisioning.
trigger_examples: maximizes container density and reduces node costs

skills.label: Pii Data Masking Proxy
skills.method: Sits between production databases and developer environments, dynamically hashing emails and SSNs so developers can test safely with real data structures.
trigger_examples: solves the dev vs. sec data access war

skills.label: Snowflake Zombie Query Killer
skills.method: Identifies automated BI dashboard queries running on empty datasets or returning unused data, and permanently pauses the warehouse compute.
trigger_examples: slashes cloud data warehouse bills by 20%

skills.label: Kafka Consumer Lag Autoscaler
skills.method: Monitors streaming data queues. If messages pile up faster than they are processed, it automatically spins up more consumer pods, scaling down when empty.
trigger_examples: ensures real-time data actually stays real-time

skills.label: Zero Day Iocs Sweeper
skills.method: Ingests new Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) from CISA, retroactively scans 30 days of SIEM logs to see if the network was already breached.
